mapper.sql: SELECT ESNTL_ID uniqId, 'USR01' userTy, MBER_ID userId, MBER_NM userNm, MBER_EMAIL_ADRES emailAdres, GROUP_ID groupId, MBER_STTUS sttus, SBSCRB_DE sbscrbDe FROM TB_GNRL_MBER UNION ALL SELECT ESNTL_ID uniqId, 'USR02' userTy, ENTRPRS_MBER_ID userId, CMPNY_NM userNm, APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES emailAdres, GROUP_ID groupId, ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS sttus, SBSCRB_DE sbscrbDe FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER UNION ALL SELECT ESNTL_ID uniqId, 'USR03' userTy, EMPLYR_ID userId, USER_NM userNm, EMAIL_ADRES emailAdres, GROUP_ID groupId, EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE sttus, SBSCRB_DE sbscrbDe FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_GNRL_MBER ( ESNTL_ID , MBER_ID , MBER_NM , PASSWORD , PASSWORD_HINT , PASSWORD_CNSR , IHIDNUM , SEXDSTN_CODE , ZIP , ADRES , AREA_NO , MBER_STTUS , DETAIL_ADRES , END_TELNO , MBTLNUM , GROUP_ID , MBER_FXNUM , MBER_EMAIL_ADRES , MIDDLE_TELNO , TELNO , OCCP_TY , SBSCRB_DE ) VALUES( #{uniqId}, #{mberId}, #{mberNm}, #{password}, #{passwordHint}, #{passwordCnsr}, #{ihidnum}, #{sexdstnCode}, #{zip}, #{adres}, #{areaNo}, #{mberSttus}, #{detailAdres}, #{endTelno}, #{moblphonNo}, #{groupId}, #{mberFxnum}, #{mberEmailAdres}, #{middleTelno}, #{telno}, #{occpTy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_GNRL_MBER SET MBER_STTUS = 'P' WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
UPDATE TB_ENTRPRS_MBER SET ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS = 'P' WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
UPDATE TB_EMPLYR_INFO SET EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE = 'P' WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
mapper.select: SELECT ESNTL_ID uniqId, 'USR01' userTy, MBER_ID mberId, MBER_NM mberNm, PASSWORD password, PASSWORD_HINT passwordHint, PASSWORD_CNSR passwordCnsr, IHIDNUM ihidnum, SEXDSTN_CODE sexdstnCode, ZIP zip, ADRES adres, AREA_NO areaNo, MBER_STTUS mberSttus, DETAIL_ADRES detailAdres, END_TELNO endTelno, MBTLNUM moblphonNo, GROUP_ID groupId, MBER_FXNUM mberFxnum, MBER_EMAIL_ADRES mberEmailAdres, MIDDLE_TELNO middleTelno, TELNO telno, OCCP_TY occpTy, TO_CHAR(SBSCRB_DE,'YYYY-MM-DD') sbscrbDe FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE ESNTL_ID=#{uniqId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_GNRL_MBER SET MBER_ID = #{mberId}, MBER_NM = #{mberNm}, PASSWORD_HINT = #{passwordHint}, PASSWORD_CNSR = #{passwordCnsr}, IHIDNUM = #{ihidnum}, SEXDSTN_CODE = #{sexdstnCode}, ZIP = #{zip}, ADRES = #{adres}, AREA_NO = #{areaNo}, MBER_STTUS = #{mberSttus}, DETAIL_ADRES = #{detailAdres}, END_TELNO = #{endTelno}, MBTLNUM = #{moblphonNo}, GROUP_ID = #{groupId}, MBER_FXNUM = #{mberFxnum}, MBER_EMAIL_ADRES = #{mberEmailAdres}, MIDDLE_TELNO = #{middleTelno}, TELNO = #{telno}, OCCP_TY = #{occpTy} WHERE ESNTL_ID=#{uniqId}
mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID , USE_STPLAT_CN , INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{stplatId}
SELECT PASSWORD password FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE ESNTL_ID=#{uniqId}

SELECT COUNT(1) usedCnt FROM( SELECT EMPLYR_ID userId FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO UNION ALL SELECT ENTRPRS_MBER_ID userId FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER UNION ALL SELECT MBER_ID userId FROM TB_GNRL_MBER ) A WHERE userId = #{checkId}
